TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Paridrayan, title = Paridrayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Paridrayan} }

S.FORM: alang Paridrayan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 229 buwan, 733 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 718 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Rukay 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Paridrayan hya' ga Tjusepayuan. tay 'zil na Paridrayan hya' ga Cavak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Paridrayan ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 229 buwan, 733 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 718 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 15 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 95%, Rukay 1%, Bunun 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Paridrayan hya' ga Tjusepayuan. tay 'zil na Paridrayan hya' ga Cavak. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san "tuqi'"qu spzyang glgang nha qalang musa' ana inu'. basu kisya' glgan ungat kisya' nya'. spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč pari*rajan …£a nija mki s~…ēku ńßeto keŇč atu s~…ēantimon …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, ő≤unun *%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj mkjańßu Ē na pari*rajan ńßja Ē …£a tjus~…ēepajuan. taj Ēzil na pari*rajan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®a*ak. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan "tuqi Ē"qu s~…ēpzjaŇč …£l…£aŇč nńßa qalaŇč mus~…ēa Ē ana inu Ē. ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an uŇčat kis~…ēja Ē nja Ē. s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
